items.title: (1/2) Last season, the Wizards' big-man rotation consisted primarily of Alex Sarr, Marvin Bagley III (before he was traded), Tristan Vukčević, Anthony Gill and whichever natural wing who wound up starting at the four (Khris Middleton or Justin Champagnie, for instance).
items.author: Josh Robbins

items.title: When Marvin Bagley III takes the court for the Nuggets, he'll be the highest selected player in the NBA Draft to play for Denver since 2000 first overall pick Kenyon Martin.
items.author: Jake Shapiro

items.title: [Charania] Free agent center Marvin Bagley III has agreed to a one-year deal with the Denver Nuggets, sources tell ESPN. A critical frontcourt addition for the Nuggets.
items.author: curryybacon
